public_reputation: Known around Ironspool Ward District through day-to-day work as tavern fixer.
appearance: Talien Sunweave usually presents in bright-plumed coat brushed too often for comfort, with details that make their tavern fixer status legible before introductions begin.
manner: Works social messes back into usable shape with a practical eye for leverage, embarrassment, and timing. In Ironspool Ward District, that habit reads through the public pressures of the place rather than decorative flourish.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of tavern fixer in and around Ironspool Ward District, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Ironspool Ward District workable through the obligations of tavern fixer while managing the immediate pressure of desperation contracts, petty crime, omens and superstition.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of tavern fixer credible while absorbing the strain created by desperation contracts, petty crime, omens and superstition.

support_scope_notes: Created in V33_1 to ensure every locality-facing NPC access role resolves to a proper named person while remaining sparse and canon-safe. V33_1 additive depth pass preserved canon while strengthening at-table identity, appearance, and social motive.

first_impression: Talien Sunweave presents as someone shaped by the duties of a tavern fixer and the daily pressures of Ironspool Ward District.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a tavern fixer, and proof that strangers will not make Ironspool Ward District harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Talien Sunweave refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a tavern fixer too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can smooth local friction, broker introductions, and redirect low-level trouble.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Talien Sunweave adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Talien Sunweave always knows more about Ironspool Ward District than is immediately visible.
